content: The transformer attention mechanism computes scaled dot-product attention over query, key, and value matrices. Self-attention lets the model weigh sequence positions when producing each output representation. This is a frozen fixture used by the key-free nightly smoke to exercise the curator pipeline without any Claude API call.
title: Transformer attention mechanism

content: The CLI entry point parses subcommands and dispatches to handlers. Each command returns a Result type rather than throwing, so the top-level handler maps errors to friendly messages and exit codes. The deterministic control plane owns durable state; the model only proposes.
title: CLI command dispatch and Result-typed handlers

content: When the index reports no compiled knowledge, the workspace has not been compiled yet; run the compile pass first. When a database lock error appears, another process holds the workspace state file. These are the two most common operator failure modes and their fixes.
title: Common workspace failure modes and fixes
